title: Meesho Product Scraper - Social Commerce Data
description: Scrape public Meesho product catalog data by search term. Extract prices, ratings, reviews, categories, delivery flags, images, tags, sizes, and product URLs.

searchQueries.title: Search Queries
searchQueries.description: Product search terms to scrape from Meesho. Each query is processed in sequence.

minPrice.title: Minimum Price
minPrice.description: Only keep products with a price greater than or equal to this INR value.

maxPrice.title: Maximum Price
maxPrice.description: Only keep products with a price less than or equal to this INR value.

minRating.title: Minimum Rating
minRating.description: Only keep products with a rating greater than or equal to this value.

includeAds.title: Include Sponsored Products
includeAds.description: Include products marked as ads or sponsored placements.

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of products to save across all search queries.

maxPagesPerQuery.title: Max Pages Per Query
maxPagesPerQuery.description: Maximum number of Meesho result pages to request for each search query.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. Residential India proxy is recommended because Meesho blocks many datacenter IPs.
